title: Welcome to Ruby! 💎
description: Discover what Ruby is and why developers love its elegant syntax.

slides.title: What is Ruby? 🤔
slides.content:
# A Language User Best Friend

Ruby is a dynamic, open-source programming language with a focus on **simplicity and productivity**.

Created by Yukihiro "Matz" Matsumoto in 1995, Ruby was designed to make programming *fun* and *natural*.

It features an elegant syntax that is natural to read and easy to write. Because of this, it feels like reading plain English!

slides.title: Quick Check 🧠
slides.content: Let's see if you were paying attention!

quizData.question: What was one of the primary goals when Ruby was created?

options.text: To be the fastest language in the world
To make programming fun and focus on simplicity

quizData.explanation: Ruby was designed to make programming enjoyable and its syntax simple and human-readable.

slides.title: Why Learn Ruby? 🚀
slides.content:
Here are a few reasons Ruby is awesome:

* **Easy to Learn:** Its English-like syntax makes it beginner-friendly.
* **Ruby on Rails:** A massively popular framework for building websites (used by GitHub, Shopify, Airbnb, and more).
* **Everything is an Object:** This makes Ruby extremely powerful and flexible (more on this later!).
* **Great Community:** Rubyists are known to be friendly and helpful. 'Matz is nice so we are nice' (MINSWAN).

slides.title: Quick Check 🧠
slides.content: Let's review the framework that made Ruby famous.

quizData.question: Which insanely popular web framework is built using Ruby?
quizData.explanation: Ruby on Rails (often just called "Rails") is a legendary web framework built with Ruby.

slides.title: Pro Tip 💡
slides.content:
## You'll love Ruby!

If programming seems scary, don't worry. Ruby was built specifically for *developer happiness*. You'll find yourself writing programs faster than you ever thought possible.
